data.title: Pasquarelli Auto Achieves Strong Growth in 1H 2025, Boosted by Strategic Acquisitions
data.description:
Pasquarelli Auto SpA ( (IT:PSQ) ) just unveiled an update.

Pasquarelli Auto reported a strong performance in the first half of 2025, with a production value of €199.7 million, marking a 12% increase from the previous year. The company saw significant growth in EBITDA and net profit, driven by increased sales of new and used cars, outperforming the Italian market. The strategic acquisition of Sesto Autoveicoli is expected to enhance Pasquarelli’s market presence and distribution capabilities, particularly in Lombardy, while the inclusion of BYD in its portfolio positions the company to capitalize on the growing electric vehicle market.

The most recent analyst rating on (IT:PSQ) stock is a Buy with a EUR3.20 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Pasquarelli Auto SpA stock, see the IT:PSQ Stock Forecast page.

More about Pasquarelli Auto SpA

Pasquarelli Auto S.p.A. is a mobility provider involved in the trade of new and used cars and commercial vehicles under its brand SecondLife. The company also offers short, medium, and long-term rentals, as well as assistance and sales of spare parts. It is listed on the Euronext Growth Milan market.

Average Trading Volume: 8,957

Technical Sentiment Signal: Hold

Learn more about PSQ stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Rush Gold Corp. Closes Oversubscribed Private Placement, Raising CAD$514,500
data.description:
Rush Gold Corp. ( (TSE:RGN) ) has shared an announcement.

Rush Gold Corp. announced the successful closure of an oversubscribed unit private placement, raising CAD$514,500. This financing strengthens the company’s balance sheet and supports its exploration initiatives in Nevada, while also enhancing shareholder value. The participation of insiders in the financing marks a related party transaction, with the company relying on specific exemptions for this process.

More about Rush Gold Corp.

Rush Gold Corp. is a Canadian mining exploration company focused on advancing its properties located in the Republic Mining District, Nye County, Nevada.

data.title: AGEDB Technology Secures $800,000 in Private Placement
data.description:
AGEDB Technology Ltd ( (TSE:AGET) ) has issued an announcement.

AGEDB Technology Ltd. has successfully closed a non-brokered private placement, raising $800,000 through the issuance of 16,000,000 common shares at $0.05 per share. The proceeds from this offering will be used for working capital purposes, with the shares subject to a hold period until January 27, 2026. This financial move is expected to bolster the company’s operational capabilities and strengthen its market position in the enterprise database solutions industry.

More about AGEDB Technology Ltd

AGEDB Technology Ltd. is a leading provider of enterprise database solutions, specializing in advanced database technologies such as graph databases and data processing systems, offering robust solutions to clients worldwide.

data.title: Parent Capital Corp. Closes Upsized Private Placement and Plans Debt Settlement
data.description:
Parent Capital ( ($TSE:PAR.H) ) has shared an announcement.

Parent Capital Corp. has successfully closed an upsized private placement, raising $758,060 through the issuance of 12,634,333 units at $0.06 per unit. The proceeds will be used to settle debts and for general corporate purposes, enhancing the company’s financial position. Additionally, the company plans to settle $61,960.02 of outstanding debt by issuing common shares, aiming to preserve cash and improve financial stability. The offering and debt settlement are subject to final regulatory approvals, with a four-month hold period on issued securities under Canadian laws.

More about Parent Capital

Parent Capital Corp. operates in the financial industry, focusing on capital management and investment services. The company is listed on the TSX Venture Exchange under the symbol PAR.H.

data.title: Eletrobras Approves R$ 700 Million Debenture Issuance for Eletronorte
data.description:
Centrais Elc Braz Pfb B Elbras ( ($EBR.B) ) has provided an update.

On September 26, 2025, Eletrobras announced that its subsidiary, Eletronorte, received approval from the Board of Directors for its 8th issuance of simple debentures, amounting to R$ 700 million. These debentures, benefiting from tax incentives under Law No. 12,431/2011, will mature on September 15, 2035, and are part of the Eco Invest Brasil Program. The issuance aims to attract professional investors and is guaranteed by Eletrobras, enhancing its financial strategy and market positioning.

The most recent analyst rating on ($EBR.B) stock is a Buy with a $9.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Centrais Elc Braz Pfb B Elbras stock, see the EBR.B Stock Forecast page.

data.title: Elcora Completes Financial Filings Amid Management Cease Trade Order
data.description:
An announcement from Elcora Advanced Materials ( (TSE:ERA) ) is now available.

Elcora Advanced Materials Corp. has filed its audited annual and interim financial statements, addressing the Management Cease Trade Order (MCTO) issued by the Nova Scotia Securities Commission. The MCTO remains in effect until all required filings are received by the Commission, affecting the trading activities of the company’s executives and directors. The company assures stakeholders that there have been no material changes or anticipated defaults beyond the initial announcement, maintaining transparency in its operations.

data.title: First Majestic Silver Releases Updated Technical Reports for Mexican Mines
data.description:

First Majestic Silver Corp. has released two technical reports with an effective date of August 31, 2025, detailing the mineral resource and reserve estimates for its San Dimas Silver/Gold Mine and La Encantada Silver Mine in Mexico. These reports, dated September 24, 2025, provide updated assessments of the mineral resources and reserves, which are crucial for the company’s strategic planning and operational decisions. The release of these reports is significant for stakeholders as it offers insights into the company’s resource base and potential future production capabilities, potentially impacting its market positioning and investor confidence.

data.title: CMB.TECH Completes Merger with Golden Ocean Group
data.description:
Euronav ( (CMBT) ) has issued an announcement.

CMB.TECH, a company in the technology sector, completed a merger with Golden Ocean Group Limited on August 20, 2025. This merger involves the integration of Golden Ocean’s financials, including audited consolidated balance sheets and statements of operations, cash flows, and changes in equity for the years ending December 31, 2024, 2023, and 2022. The merger is expected to enhance CMB.TECH’s market positioning by leveraging Golden Ocean’s assets and financial strength. The announcement highlights the completion of the merger and the incorporation of Golden Ocean’s financials into CMB.TECH’s reporting, which may have significant implications for stakeholders, particularly in terms of financial performance and strategic growth.
